thought.text: I see the issue - we removed too much. Let's restore the necessary lexer rules:

action.old_str:
Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit
        |   Digit
        )*
    ;

fragment
IdentifierNondigit
    :   Nondigit
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;
action.new_str:
Identifier
    :   Nondigit (Nondigit | Digit)*
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;

fragment
Digit
    :   [0-9]
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4", "old_str": "Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit
        |   Digit
        )*
    ;

fragment
IdentifierNondigit
    :   Nondigit
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;", "new_str": "Identifier
    :   Nondigit (Nondigit | Digit)*
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;

fragment
Digit
    :   [0-9]
    ;", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Fix Identifier rule"}
